jsonLd.title: Principal Investment Banker at CCAvenue
jsonLd.description:
We at CCAvenue are looking for an experienced Investment Banker based out of Gwalior. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About CCAvenue:
CCAvenue is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Income Tax

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CCAvenue!
